codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: InsForge client now throws a descriptive missing-env error, duplicate src/lib/schema.sql is removed, db/schema.sql remains the schema source and includes creator_profile/social_accounts plus the three requested posts columns, and posts.pillar has no hardcoded CHECK constraint.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit ac039be. No blocking or non-blocking defects found relative to the requested behavior.
